sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40037" key="e)pilh/ptwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλήπτ-ωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n40037.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">censurer</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ζήνωνος πάντων ἐπιλήπτορος</foreign> Timo <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
